## Description

Briefly describe the changes made in this pull request. Include:

- What was changed
- Why the change was necessary
- Any relevant context or background

## Type of Change

Please mark the relevant option with an `x`:

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Tests (adding or updating tests)
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Breaking Changes

If this PR introduces breaking changes, please describe them:

- What changed
- How users should update their code
- Migration steps if applicable

## Related Issues

Fixes #(issue number)
Relates to #(issue number)
Closes #(issue number)

## Testing

Describe how you tested these changes:

- [ ] All existing tests pass
- [ ] New tests added for the changes
- [ ] Tested manually in a browser
- [ ] Tested API endpoints
- [ ] Tested Livewire components

```bash
# Test command output
php artisan test
```

## Database Changes

- [ ] No database changes
- [ ] Migration included
- [ ] Migration requires separate rollback plan

If migrations are included, describe them:

```bash
# Migration details
php artisan migrate
```

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the Laravel coding standards
- [ ] I have run `composer run lint` (Pint)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code where necessary
- [ ] I have added or updated documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally
- [ ] New and existing tests pass locally
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged

## Performance Impact

- [ ] No performance impact
- [ ] Performance improvements
- [ ] Performance degradation (please explain)
